normal_ci_signal: Head tests pass after expected behavior is redefined through fixture and snapshot changes.
pramaan_signal: Oracle integrity emits failed receipt with sensitive_artifact_changed findings.

risk_mapping.R-008: Fixture changes can silently alter the meaning of the test oracle.
risk_mapping.R-017: Stable test fingerprints are not enough when the expected artifact changed underneath them.
risk_mapping.R-088: Snapshot or golden output changes require explicit reviewer attention.
risk_mapping.R-100: The scenario is preserved as an adversarial regression corpus entry.
